title: PREVIEW | Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay: team news, lineups, predictions (World Cup 15/06) - Yahoo Sports
original_text:
PREVIEW | Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay: team news, lineups, predictions (World Cup 15/06)
PREVIEW | Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay: team news, lineups, predictions (World Cup 15/06)
Saudi Arabia and Uruguay clash this Monday at the Hard Rock Stadium of the World Cup. Saudi Arabia mark their 7th participation in the competition, whilst Uruguay, who have already won this tournament 2 times, go into their 15th. The match will be broadcast live at 23:00 on ITV 1.
Last time out, Saudi Arabia drew 0-0 against Senegal (National Team Friendlies 2026). In their last outing, Uruguay drew 0-0 against Algeria (National Team Friendlies 2026).
Advertisement
The last meeting between the two teams ended with Uruguay winning 1-0.
Unavailable
Arábia Saudita
Uruguai
Last starting XIs
Saudi Arabia ( vs Senegal 2026-06-10): Moha Al-Owais, Saud Abdulhamid, Abdulelah Al-Amri, Hassan Tambakti, Moteb Al-Harbi, Abu Al-Shamat, Abdul Al-Khaibari, Nasser Al-Dawsari, Salem Al-Dawsari, Musab Al-Juwayr, Feras Al-Buraikan
Uruguay ( vs Algeria 2026-03-31): Sergio Rochet, Guillermo Varela, José Giménez, Ronald Araújo, Mathías Olivera, Agustín Canobbio, Fede Valverde, Maxi Araújo, Manuel Ugarte, Giorgian de Arrascaeta, Federico Viñas
